/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/tests/out_segments_path_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/parsed_mmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_canid_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_chnl_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_dir_idx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/parsed_entry_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/file_service_core_tests.dir/mmap/mmap_header_constract.cpp.o -o file_service_core_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
